paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.27 as of 2026-07-23, with a change of -4.71 percent compared to the prior close and -27.85 percent over the last 22 sessions. There has been one new news item in the last 24 hours.

Fermi Inc. has been in the news with a recent headline from PR Newswire stating "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" on 2026-07-23. This news item is the latest development in the company's recent activities.

There have been various SEC filings from Fermi Inc., including an 8-K/A form on 2026-07-21, which disclosed the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K form on 2026-07-15, which announced the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing in the feed.
